'''鈭歸-g-p-th''' ('''kawagpethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:laden|laden]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-g-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laden|laden]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-g-p-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawagpethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwagpethoko|thiwagpethoko]] || [[word:jiwagpethoko|jiwagpethoko]] || [[word:shiwagpethoko|shiwagpethoko]] || [[word:kiwagpethoko|kiwagpethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwagpethoko|thuthuwagpethoko]] || [[word:jujuwagpethoko|jujuwagpethoko]] || [[word:shushuwagpethoko|shushuwagpethoko]] || [[word:kukuwagpethoko|kukuwagpethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowagpethoko|thowagpethoko]] || [[word:jowagpethoko|jowagpethoko]] || [[word:showagpethoko|showagpethoko]] || [[word:kowagpethoko|kowagpethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
